wallet-evm-erc-4337.releaseBody:
## What's Changed
* Add @wdk/wallet-evm-erc-4337. by @vlad0k in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/1
* Fix config argument type. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/3
* Upgrade @wdk-safe-global/relay-kit to version 4.1.0. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/4
* Get transaction receipt method by @vlad0k in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/5
* Add read-only wallet account. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/9
* Update tx param to support batch transactions by @vlad0k in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/8
* feat(bare): add Bare runtime support by @claudiovb in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/12
* Merge branch `davi0kprogramsthings:develop` into branch `tetherto:develop`. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/15
* Fix bug. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/17
* Merge branch `develop` into branch `main`. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/10
* bump @wdk-safe-global/relay-kit to 4.1.3 by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/18
* bump @wdk-safe-global/relay-kit to 4.1.3 by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/19
* Update README for @wdk/wallet-evm-erc-4337 by @raigal-r in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/14
* Release: Add README by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/21
* feat: publish workflow, rename package by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/22

## New Contributors
* @vlad0k made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/1
* @Davi0kProgramsThings made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/3
* @claudiovb made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/12
* @AlonzoRicardo made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/18
* @raigal-r made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/14
* @jonathunne made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/21

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/commits/v1.0.0-beta.1

## What's Changed
* Sync develop branch by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/24
* Override dependency versions by @sontuphan in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/23
* Use bare-node-runtime by @nampc1 in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/20
* chore: public release, bump version by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/26
* Add approve() and getAllowance() methods, fetch chainId from config by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/25
* Release: 1.0.0-beta.2 by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/27
* fix: sync package-lock.json by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/28

## New Contributors
* @sontuphan made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/23
* @nampc1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/20

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/compare/v1.0.0-beta.1...v1.0.0-beta.2

## What's Changed
* Sync dev with main by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/32
* Bump bare-node-runtime and version by @nampc1 in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/30
* Fix destructuring of user operation on getTransactionReceipt() by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/31
* Fix Issue Template by @claudiovb in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/29
* Release: v1.0.0-beta.3 by @nampc1 in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/33


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/compare/v1.0.0-beta.2...v1.0.0-beta.3

## What's Changed
* feat: predictSafeAddress by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/37
* Add integration test by @Boka44 in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/38
* Add method 'getUserOperationReceipt'. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/40
* Add fee sponsorship option for transfers by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/39
* docs: add AGENTS.md by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/44
* Update integration tests by @Boka44 in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/41
* Bump safe/relay-kit dep for release, update docs by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/42
* Feature/move verify by @Boka44 in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/43
* Sync/main to develop by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/50
* Sync 'develop' branch with 'main'. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/49
* switch to @tetherto/wdk-safe-relay-kit by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/45
* fix: resolve npm audit security vulnerabilities by @quocle108 in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/52
* Feature allow paying fees with native asset by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/54
* Release: v1.0.0-beta.4 by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/51

## New Contributors
* @Boka44 made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/38
* @quocle108 made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/52

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/compare/v1.0.0-beta.3...v1.0.0-beta.4

## What's Changed
* Fix bug in the 'getFeeRates' method on legacy networks. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/61
* Allow transfer max. fee to be used with native coins policy. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/60
* Add verify/sign for typed data (EIP712)  by @HumanRupert in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/53
* Refactor getSafe4337pack by @AlonzoRicardo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/55
* Export internal configuration object types. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/63
* Add Apache 2.0 LICENSE file by @gatteo in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/64
* get token balances multicall by @alexszolowicz-blockether in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/62
* Release: v1.0.0-beta.5 by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/65

## New Contributors
* @HumanRupert made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/53
* @gatteo made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/64
* @alexszolowicz-blockether made their first contribution in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/62

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/compare/v1.0.0-beta.4...v1.0.0-beta.5

## What's Changed
* fix: re-use read only class by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/72
* Release: v1.0.0-beta.6 by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/73
* chore: bump wdk-wallet-evm version, npm audit fix by @jonathunne in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/pull/74


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337/compare/v1.0.0-beta.5...v1.0.0-beta.6

wallet-ton.releaseBody:

* use @bitcoinerlab/secp256k1 as react native doesnt support wasm by @itsdeka in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-ton/pull/4
* Merge branch `davi0kprogramsthings:develop` into branch `tetherto:main`. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-ton/pull/5
* Add the 'WalletAccountTon' class to the public api of @wdk/wallet-ton. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-ton/pull/6
* Export class 'WalletAccountTon'. by @Davi0kProgramsThings in https://github.com/tetherto/wdk-wallet-ton/pull/7
